query_description: Rank customers by total spending within each month using ROW_NUMBER()
business_context: Identify top spenders by month for targeted marketing and customer segmentation

expected_columns.name: ORDER_MONTH
expected_columns.description: First day of month (truncated from order_date)

expected_columns.name: TOTAL_SPENT
expected_columns.description: Sum of all order amounts for this customer in this month

expected_columns.name: RANK
expected_columns.description: Rank within month (1=highest spender, 2=second highest, etc)

validation_rules: Results must include customer_id, order_month, total_spent, rank columns
Rank 1 should have highest total_spent for that month
Rank increments by 1 for each row within partition
Rank resets to 1 for each new month (PARTITION BY month)
Results ordered by order_month DESC, then rank ASC
No NULL values in customer_id, total_spent, or rank
total_spent is sum of amounts grouped by customer and month
Months shown in descending order (newest first)

row_1.expectation: Highest spender of most recent month gets rank 1

row_2.expectation: Second highest spender of that month gets rank 2
row_2.check: RANK = 2 AND same month as row 1

month_boundary.expectation: When month changes, rank resets to 1
month_boundary.check: Different ORDER_MONTH → RANK goes back to 1

common_mistakes: Using GROUP BY only (results in single row per customer-month, loses window function)
Forgetting PARTITION BY (ranks across all months, not within each)
Using RANK() instead of ROW_NUMBER() (RANK() has gaps on ties)
Window function ORDER BY using descending instead of DESC (wrong rank order)
Final ORDER BY missing (results not sorted by month then rank)
